tasks.title: Implement Telegram Bot API integration for commands, inline queries, and message formatting
Implement Overpass API integration for supermarket/convenience store POI queries
Implement Nominatim API integration for address geocoding and reverse lookups
Design user preference storage for radius, max results, and filter settings
Implement Redis/in-memory cache for Overpass/Nominatim responses with TTL
Integrate opening hours parser library for evaluating 'open now' status
Handle location input via GPS sharing, address geocoding, and geocode candidate selection
Implement Overpass query execution, distance sorting, and open-now filtering logic
Format search results with inline keyboards, map links, and no-results suggestions
Implement /settings command and inline menu with 'Back to Results' button
Implement rate limiting, retry logic, and permission error recovery flows
Support inline query mode with location-based and address-based suggestions
Send critical errors and quota alerts to admin Telegram channel
